description: Stop high-risk commits before they leave the working tree.

checks.rule: Reject tokens, secrets, or credential-like strings in staged files.
Reject unexpected binary files and warn on oversized assets.
Reject exaggerated medical advertising and guaranteed-outcome phrases.
Warn on AI-product-like vocabulary or flashy AI-looking UI copy.
If pages/ changed, remind to run python scripts/generate-status-xlsx.py.
Reject news Query Loop changes lacking clinic taxQuery.

acceptance: Common repo accidents are blocked before commit.
misao-specific editorial and workflow rules are checked.
